multiCurrency.title: Multi-Currency Transaction
multiCurrency.description: Since you're spending in {{expenseCurrency}} but your account is in {{accountCurrency}}, you can specify the exact amount debited from your account (including taxes/fees).
multiCurrency.amountPlaceholder: e.g. How many {{currency}} were actually charged
multiCurrency.helper: Optional: The system will calculate the effective exchange rate automatically
multiCurrency.exampleText: If you spent USD 20 on Netflix and were charged ARS 31,500 (including 75% "dólar tarjeta" tax), enter 31500 here. The system will calculate the effective rate: 1575 ARS/USD.
